executive_summary.recommended_ui_home: EPR tab with subtabs: Overview, Visit Planner, Hotel Intelligence, Incident Risk, Security Mitigation, Tasks & Governance

safety_improvement.basis: AI filters out high-crime areas + validates security features

workflow: Hand off travel needs to Hotel Intelligence

steps.system_action: Open /spotnana-mock in new window with pre-filled hotels

steps.notes: Top hotel has 'RECOMMENDED BY FPI' badge and safety score

recent_incident_sample.description: Management reported that a customer made threats of violence towards an associate due to a perceived lack of customer service. Law enforcement was notified, but the customer fled property prior to their arrival. No injuries were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that an individual struck an associate with pepper spray as they were attempting to flee property with unpaid merchandise. Law enforcement arrived and detained the individual. No injuries were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported an individual made threats of violence in reference to an associate due to personal reasons. Law enforcement was notified but the individual fled the property. No injuries were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that a customer struck an associate due to a personal dispute. Law enforcement was notified, arrived, and removed the customer without further issue. No injuries were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that a customer made threats of violence towards an associate due to a lack of perceived customer service. Law enforcement was notified, but the customer fled property prior to their arrival. No injuries were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported a customer physically assaulted an associate due to unknown reasons. No injuries were reported. Law enforcement responded, however, the customer fled. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported an associate made a threat of violence towards another associate due to personal reasons. No injuries were reported. Law enforcement was not notified. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that a customer made a threat of violence toward an associate due to domestic issues. Law enforcement was notified and no impact to business operations were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that an associate sent messages of physical violence towards two other associates. Law enforcement was not notified and no injuries were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported three customers were involved in a physical altercation due to an unknown reason, and management responded to the area in an attempt to deescalate the situation. Law enforcement also responded for assistance, but the involved customers fled the property prior to their arrival. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that a customer made threats of violence towards multiple associates after being refused to given a ride offsite. Law enforcement was notified, arrived, and assisted. No injuries were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that an individual made threats of physical violence towards a customer while referencing a firearm. Law enforcement was not notified and both parties left property without further issue. No injuries were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that a third-party delivery driver made verbal threats towards an associate in the parking lot due to personal reasons. Law enforcement was notified and made reports. No injuries were reported and no impact to business operations. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported reported one vendor physically assaulted another vendor due to unknown reasons. No injuries were reported. Law enforcement was not notified. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that a passenger to a third party delivery driver became irate regarding two associates dispensing an order. The individual proceeded to issue verbal threats and display a firearm to the associates. Law enforcement was contacted and a report was filed due to the suspect leaving the property. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that an individual made a threat of physical harm toward an AP associate, claiming they were being watched. The individual left, then returned briefly to shoplift shoes, and left again without further incident. Law enforcement was notified. Threat Management on-call was engaged for further assistance. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported a customer made threats of violence towards an associate in the parking lot due to unknown reasons. Law enforcement was not notified and no injuries were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that a customer made threats of violence toward two associates on a social media post, due to a transaction dispute. Law enforcement was not notified, no injuries were reported, and store operations were not impacted. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Update (4/25/26, 10:07 AM CDT): Law enforcement was able to place the subject into custody and gave the all clear. Business operations resumed after approximately one and half hours. Management reported that an unknown individual locked themselves in the mother’s room claiming to have a bomb and the facility is evacuating. Law enforcement is on scene investigating. No injuries were reported and all associates are accounted for.

Management reported that an unknown individual locked themselves in the mother’s room claiming to have a bomb and the facility is evacuating. Law enforcement is on scene investigating. No injuries were reported and all associates are accounted for.

Management reported two individuals discharged an orbeeze gun and struck a customer. No injuries were reported. Law enforcement responded and made contact with the individuals. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that an associate made a threat toward two members of management during their termination. The associate left without further incident. Law enforcement assistance was not needed. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported an associate informed them of a social media post where another associate made a comment that included threat of violence in reference to the facility. Management is currently investigating. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that a shoplifter used pepper spray to assault them after they had attempted to stop the shoplifter from fleeing the site. Law enforcement responded and are searching for the shoplifter offsite. EMS was not notified, the member of management did not seek medical treatment. Store operations were not impacted. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that two minors engaged in a physical altercation on the sales floor for unknown reasons. No injuries or impacts to operations were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that individual spat on a tenant employee for unknown reasons. Law enforcement was notified, but the individual fled prior to their arrival. No injuries were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that a customer made verbal threats towards an associate due asking for a receipt check. Law enforcement was notified, no injuries were reported, and no impact to business operations. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that a customer pushed an associate for unknown reasons before leaving the facility. Law enforcement was not notified and no injuries were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that a customer verbally threatened another customer due to the second customer yelling at an associate for not being fast while checking customers out. Law enforcement was not contacted and both of the customers left the facility without further incident. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that an associate made a threat of violence toward a customer due to unknown reasons. The customer notified law enforcement and had an officer follow them as they continued shopping in the facility. Management is further investigating the incident. Store operations were not impacted and no injuries were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

recommender_rules: License Plate Reader -> repeat (store, incident_type) patterns
Armed Security Team -> incidents mentioning weapons/firearms
Lot Cop -> 3+ parking-lot incidents (heavier investment threshold)
Pole Cop -> any parking-lot incident (cheaper first step)
High Security Lighting -> any parking-lot incident (passive deterrent)
Unarmed Security -> parking-lot incidents WITHOUT high weapon involvement
Axon Body Camera (8 or 16) -> 2+ associate-facing incidents; 16-pack at 5+

roi_formula.bundle_dedup_rule: Each incident credited to the highest-effectiveness solution that prevents it - never double-counted across overlapping solutions.
